mapper.insert: insert into `student_feature`(student_id, course_id, attendance_count, attendance_rate, homework_submit_rate, homework_avg_score, exam_avg_score, earned_credit, gpa, missing_homework_count, absent_exam_count, recent_risk_trend, feature_date, create_time) values (#{studentId}, #{courseId}, #{attendanceCount}, #{attendanceRate}, #{homeworkSubmitRate}, #{homeworkAvgScore}, #{examAvgScore}, #{earnedCredit}, #{gpa}, #{missingHomeworkCount}, #{absentExamCount}, #{recentRiskTrend}, #{featureDate}, #{createTime})
